title: Account
description: Business that represents a customer or potential customer. The company that is billed in business transactions. Corresponds to the account entity type in the Microsoft.Dynamics.CRM namespace.

name.description: Company or business name of the account.

accountnumber.description: ID number or code for the account to quickly search and identify the account in system views.

accountcategorycode.description: Category indicating whether the customer account is standard or preferred. 1 = Preferred Customer, 2 = Standard.

accountclassificationcode.description: Classification code indicating the potential value of the customer account. 1 = Default Value.

accountratingcode.description: Rating indicating the value of the customer account.

emailaddress1.description: Primary email address for the account.

emailaddress2.description: Secondary email address for the account.

emailaddress3.description: Alternate email address for the account.

telephone1.description: Main phone number for the account.

telephone2.description: Second phone number for the account.

telephone3.description: Third phone number for the account.

industrycode.description: Primary industry of the account for marketing segmentation. Values include 1=Accounting, 2=Agriculture, 3=Broadcasting, 4=Brokers, 5=Building Supply, 6=Business Services, 7=Consulting, 8=Consumer Services, and others up to 33=Wholesale.

numberofemployees.description: Number of employees at the account.

revenue_base.description: Annual revenue converted to the system default base currency.

ownershipcode.description: Ownership structure of the account. 1 = Public, 2 = Private, 3 = Subsidiary, 4 = Other.

customertypecode.description: Category describing the relationship between the account and the organization. 1=Competitor, 2=Consultant, 3=Customer, 4=Investor, 5=Partner, 6=Influencer, 7=Press, 8=Prospect, 9=Reseller, 10=Supplier, 11=Vendor, 12=Other.

businesstypecode.description: Legal designation or other business type of the account.

tickersymbol.description: Stock exchange symbol for the account.

stockexchange.description: Stock exchange at which the account is listed.

sharesoutstanding.description: Number of shares available to the public.

creditonhold.description: Whether the credit for the account is on hold.

paymenttermscode.description: Payment terms for the account. 1 = Net 30, 2 = 2% 10 Net 30, 3 = Net 45, 4 = Net 60.

preferredcontactmethodcode.description: Preferred method of contact. 1 = Any, 2 = Email, 3 = Phone, 4 = Fax, 5 = Mail.

donotemail.description: Whether the account allows direct email.

donotphone.description: Whether the account allows phone calls.

donotpostalmail.description: Whether the account allows direct mail.

donotbulkemail.description: Whether the account allows bulk email through campaigns.

donotsendmm.description: Whether the account accepts marketing materials.

address1_name.description: Descriptive name for the primary address.

address1_line1.description: First line of the primary address.

address1_line2.description: Second line of the primary address.

address1_line3.description: Third line of the primary address.

address1_stateorprovince.description: State or province for the primary address.

address1_postalcode.description: ZIP code or postal code for the primary address.

address1_country.description: Country or region for the primary address.

address1_telephone1.description: Main phone number for the primary address.

address1_fax.description: Fax number for the primary address.

address1_latitude.description: Latitude value for the primary address.

address1_longitude.description: Longitude value for the primary address.

address1_addresstypecode.description: Primary address type. 1 = Bill To, 2 = Ship To, 3 = Primary, 4 = Other.

address2_name.description: Descriptive name for the secondary address.

address2_line1.description: First line of the secondary address.

address2_line2.description: Second line of the secondary address.

address2_line3.description: Third line of the secondary address.

address2_stateorprovince.description: State or province for the secondary address.

address2_postalcode.description: ZIP code or postal code for the secondary address.

address2_country.description: Country or region for the secondary address.

statecode.description: Status of the account. 0 = Active, 1 = Inactive. Inactive accounts are read-only.

statuscode.description: Status reason for the account. 1 = Active, 2 = Inactive.

createdon.description: Date and time when the account record was created.

modifiedon.description: Date and time when the account record was last updated.

versionnumber.description: Version number of the account record.

_primarycontactid_value.description: Lookup property for the primary contact of the account.

_parentaccountid_value.description: Lookup property for the parent account.

_ownerid_value.description: Lookup property for the user or team assigned to manage the record.

_transactioncurrencyid_value.description: Lookup property for the currency associated with the record.

yominame.description: Phonetic spelling of the company name for Japanese pronunciation.
